top_level_artifacts.name: .claude
top_level_artifacts.justification: CWD-rooted rule/agent/skill/hook/plugin discovery for Agent-Red-scoped Claude Code sessions; minimal placeholder per Codex GO sub-slice 1 condition 2 (no GT-KB platform content imported)

top_level_artifacts.name: .codex
top_level_artifacts.justification: CWD-rooted config discovery for Agent-Red-scoped Codex sessions; minimal placeholder per Codex GO sub-slice 1 condition 2 (no GT-KB platform content imported)

top_level_artifacts.name: .dockerignore
top_level_artifacts.justification: Build-context ignore at Dockerfile location; placeholder pending Phase 3 infra cluster move that brings Dockerfile* into this directory

top_level_artifacts.name: .gtkb-app-isolation.json
top_level_artifacts.justification: Self-referential registry file required by the minimization principle; the registry must contain itself for the scanner to validate its own presence

top_level_artifacts.name: .vscode
top_level_artifacts.justification: Workspace settings discovery from opened folder; per owner directive 2026-04-27 the VSCode workspace root for the Agent Red project is applications/Agent_Red/

top_level_artifacts.name: harness-state
top_level_artifacts.purpose: Application-level harness state (created S315 by owner; pre-existing; in-scope of application-isolation-contract)

top_level_artifacts.name: incident-response
top_level_artifacts.purpose: Agent Red incident-response artifacts (created S310 by IR-0.1 boundary work; pre-existing; in-scope of application-isolation-contract)

top_level_artifacts.name: pdf-tooling
top_level_artifacts.purpose: Agent Red PDF generation tooling and identity-report artifacts (migrated from GT-KB root in S331 sub-slice 18.B; covered by DELIB-S330-AGENT-RED-MIGRATION-PENDING-WAIVER v1 SCOPE clause)

rules: Every top-level entry must match a registry entry by name+type
Registry entries with bucket=A require non-empty purpose
Registry entries with bucket=B require non-empty tool and justification
Bucket=C and bucket=D are not allowed at app root

out_of_scope_for_sub_slice_1: Formal DELIB/ADR/DCL writes via approval packets (sub-slice 6)
Cluster moves beyond PDF (subsequent phases per Phase E audit §B.1 sequence)
.gitignore modifications (per proposal -005 §7.2; deferred to a follow-up hygiene sub-slice)

known_limitations.issue: File exists on disk but is not git-tracked. The existing .gitignore line 90 (.vscode/) ignores the entire .vscode/ directory at any depth; the negation at line 91 (!.vscode/settings.json) cannot take effect because git does not descend into ignored parent directories.
known_limitations.impact: VSCode opening applications/Agent_Red/ in this checkout will read settings.json correctly. Fresh clones or git clean -fdx will not retain the file or directory. Cross-machine persistence requires either changing line 90 to .vscode/* or adding a more specific negation pattern.
known_limitations.deferred_to: Follow-up gitignore-hygiene sub-slice. Per sub-slice 1 proposal -005 §7.2, .gitignore modifications were explicitly out of scope of this slice.
